name: Kowa Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kowa Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells welfare nursing care products in Japan. It offers walking related products comprising walking cars; walking aids/walk assistance carts; silver cars; and single, telescopic, multi-leg, clutch, and option walking canes; bath aids, such as shower chairs, bath care belts, bathtub mats and footsteps, hand rails, and duckboards; and eating related products, including dishware products and utensils, and eating care goods. The company also provides sleeping related products consisting of underwear and everyday wear products, and socks, as well as bed related products, such as waterproof sheets and moving belts; and toilet related products, including furniture style portable toilets, acrylic resin portable toilets, urine bottles, insert bedpans, and various toilet support goods. In addition, it offers hygiene and health related products comprises mouth care goods and medicine boxes. The company serves chain stores, national welfare equipment lease companies, department stores, mail-order companies, and others, as well as wholesale trading companies for welfare equipment. Kowa Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
